name: ADS-B Traffic Avoidance Commissioning
description: You are a Remote Sensing Scientist preparing a vehicle for a BVLOS pipeline inspection. The flight corridor mandates strict active traffic avoidance measures to prevent collisions with manned aircraft. Configure the 7 required ADSB and AVD (Avoidance) parameters on the vehicle exactly as specified in the regulatory mandate document located at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/caa_adsb_mandate.txt. Export the final parameter configuration to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/adsb_configured.params.
